description: Create a fully constrained 3D keyed hub in SolveSpace by extruding a 2D cross-section to a thickness of 25mm. The sketch must feature an outer circle (40mm diameter, centered at origin) and an inner loop comprising a 7.5mm radius arc (centered at origin) with a symmetric 5mm wide keyway. The keyway's top edge must be horizontal and positioned 9.8mm above the origin. Ensure the sketch is fully constrained with 0 degrees of freedom. Save the project to ~/Documents/SolveSpace/keyed_hub.slvs and export the triangle mesh to ~/Documents/SolveSpace/keyed_hub.stl.
